[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

1 0001010000 2
2 0100110011 5
3 1011111010 7
4 1011110010 6
5 1011100110 6
6 1111110010 7
7 1111111110 9
